person.name: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox
person.alternateName: Alwyn "The Younger" de Levenax, 2nd Earl of Lennox

memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
Alwyn was the son and heir of Alwin, first earl of Lennox. Donated lands to Church of Kilpatrick, lands of Luss to Malduin, Dean of Lennox, died about 1224.

zh.lifeSummary: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox是Alwyn Oge 1st Earl of Lennox的兒子，於1160年出生在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾馮 藍妮克絲。他和Countessa Eva Menteith至少有15個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1214年12月4日之前在英國蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

nameMeanings.name: Alwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ælf ‘elf, supernatural being’ + wine ‘friend’. This was not especially common in Britain either before or after the Norman Conquest, but it is popular in the United States. The reasons for this are not entirely clear; association with Calvin may be a factor. A more plausible (though less elevated) explanation is that this was the name given to the naughty chipmunk in a popular television cartoon series of the 1960s.

en.lifeSummary: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox was born in 1160, in The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Alwyn Oge 1st Earl of Lennox. He had at least 15 sons and 2 daughters with Countessa Eva Menteith. He died before 4 December 1214, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennoxは1160年にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアス レノックスでAlwyn Oge 1st Earl of Lennoxの息子として生まれた。彼はCountessa Eva Menteithとの間に少なくとも15人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1214年12月4日以前にイギリススコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox(은)는 1160년 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르 테 렌스에서 Alwyn Oge 1st Earl of Lennox의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Countessa Eva Menteith(와)과 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 12월 4일 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 던바토실르에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox родился в 1160 г. в местности т леннокс, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Alwyn Oge 1st Earl of Lennox. У него было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 2 дочери от Countessa Eva Menteith. Он умер перед 4 декабрь 1214 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
